name: Statistical
domain: Statistical mechanics, partition functions, fluctuations, equilibrium distributions
core_insight: Macroscopic order emerges from microscopic randomness when averaged over enormous numbers. The partition function encodes all thermodynamic information. Fluctuations and dissipation are linked by the fluctuation-dissipation theorem — noise is the price of response.

key_equations.name: Partition Function
key_equations.why: Sum over all microstates weighted by Boltzmann factor — all thermodynamics derives from Z

key_equations.name: Boltzmann Distribution
key_equations.why: Probability of microstate at energy E in thermal equilibrium: exponential suppression with energy

key_equations.name: Fluctuation-Dissipation Theorem
key_equations.why: Equilibrium fluctuations determine linear response: every dissipative process has corresponding noise

seed_prompt: ▁▃▅∿ Build the partition function. All thermodynamics follows. Fluctuations are not noise — they are signal.
